title: Algorithmic Decision Process for Contributing to a Public Good
description: A flowchart depicting the strategic decision-making process of rational agents in a non-cooperative game for contributing to a public good.
relationships: Agent i evaluates if private benefit (b_i) exceeds cost (c)
If no, free-rides; G remains unchanged
All agents receive benefit from public good f(G)
Payoff is calculated: b_i + f(G) - c (if contributed) or b_i + f(G) (if free-rode)
